name: CTO Agent
title: Chief Trading Officer
capabilities: Market regime detection, strategy portfolio management, capital allocation, autonomous trading decisions

name: Market Analyst
title: Market Intelligence Analyst
capabilities: Real-time ATR, funding rate, volume, long/short ratio analysis. Classifies BTC and ETH into oscillation/trend/extreme regimes with 3-confirmation buffer.

name: Risk Agent
title: Chief Risk Officer
capabilities: Four-tier circuit breaker: strategy/asset/portfolio/emergency halt. Monitors drawdown and enforces risk limits per user tier (conservative/balanced/aggressive).

name: Strategy Manager
title: Strategy Lifecycle Manager
capabilities: Strategy promotion/demotion/elimination lifecycle. Kelly-based leaderboard scoring. Manages shadow-to-live pipeline with criteria: min days, trades, win rate, drawdown.

name: Auditor
title: Daily Report & Audit
capabilities: Generates daily natural language trading reports in Chinese. Compiles market state, P&L, circuit breaker events. Creates immutable audit trail for all DARWIN decisions.
